name: lastfm-events-ical
description: Scrape a Last.fm user's events page and expose upcoming events as an iCalendar feed over HTTP.

scripts.postinstall: cd packages/lastfm-scraper && npm install && npm run build
scripts.dev: TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.test.json NODE_ENV=development ts-node-dev --respawn --transpile-only -r tsconfig-paths/register --watch packages/lastfm-scraper/src src/index.ts

author: András Pozsgai <contact@justandras.com>
